name: use-action-row-navigation
title: useActionRowNavigation
description: Provider-backed two-zone keyboard navigation for rows with inline actions. Moves between row content and action buttons while preserving disabled-action behavior.

content.text: Tuple-aware index narrowing. For a tuple like [a, b] this yields `0 | 1`;
Tuple-aware disabled-flags shape. For a tuple it preserves length and
per-position position; for arrays it stays `readonly boolean[]`.
targetIndex is bounded to 0..actionCount-1 by getEnabledTargetIndex,
so it is always a valid Actions index when Actions is a tuple.

docs.description: Provider-backed two-zone keyboard navigation for rows with inline actions. Moves between row content and action buttons while preserving disabled-action behavior.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Enables row keyboard handling. Pass the row's active/selected state.

parameters.name: actionCount
parameters.description: Number of action controls managed by the row.

parameters.name: onAction
parameters.description: Called when Enter or Space activates the focused action.

parameters.name: disabledActions
parameters.description: Per-index disabled flags. Disabled actions are skipped during navigation and ignored on activation.

parameters.name: disabledFocusFallbackRef
parameters.description: Receives focus when entering the actions zone but no action is enabled. Falls back to blurring the focused action when omitted.

parameters.name: containerRef
parameters.description: Limits zone handling to one row subtree. When set, the hook enables focusWithinOnly so sibling rows do not respond to the same key press.

parameters.name: allowInInput
parameters.description: Allow row shortcuts to run when an editable element is focused.

parameters.name: wrap
parameters.description: Wrap ArrowLeft/ArrowRight movement across the action ends.

parameters.name: defaultZone
parameters.description: Initial zone. When set to actions, the hook focuses the default action on mount.

parameters.name: defaultIndex
parameters.description: Initial action index focused when entering the actions zone.

parameters.name: canExitActions
parameters.description: Allow ArrowUp to leave the actions zone back to content.

parameters.name: onNavigate
parameters.description: Called when navigation lands on an action index, including when entering the actions zone.

parameters.name: onNavigationBoundaryReached
parameters.description: Called when navigation cannot move further: previous when exiting actions or hitting the left edge with wrap off, next when hitting the right edge.

returns.description: Zone state plus imperative controls and a getActionProps factory to wire each action element.

properties.name: inActions
properties.description: Whether the row is currently in the actions zone.

properties.name: isFocusedActionDisabled
properties.description: Whether the current action index is disabled.

properties.name: enterActions
properties.description: Moves into the actions zone and focuses the requested or first enabled action. Returns the focused index, or null when no action is enabled.

properties.name: exitActions
properties.description: Returns to the content zone when canExitActions is true.

properties.name: reset
properties.description: Returns to content and resets the focused action index.

properties.name: getActionProps
properties.type: (index: number) => { ref: RefCallback<HTMLElement>; "data-action-index": number; onFocus: () => void }
properties.description: Props to spread onto each action element so the hook can focus and track it.

notes.title: Two zones, one row
notes.content: The hook composes useFocusZone with a content zone and an actions zone. ArrowDown enters actions from content, ArrowUp leaves actions, and ArrowLeft/ArrowRight move between actions.

notes.title: Disabled actions
notes.content: Indexes flagged in disabledActions are skipped during ArrowLeft/ArrowRight movement and ignored by Enter/Space. If every action is disabled, the hook returns to content and focuses disabledFocusFallbackRef.

notes.title: Scope rows with containerRef
notes.content: Pass containerRef for each row so its arrow keys only fire while focus is inside that row. Without it, all mounted rows share the same global keyboard handling.

notes.title: Requires KeyboardProvider
notes.content: useActionRowNavigation registers keys through useKey and useFocusZone, so it must be used within a <KeyboardProvider> tree. It is package-only.

content.text: "Request changes" is disabled, so it is skipped during navigation.
Pull request #128 — Add focus zone docs
Focus the row title, then ArrowDown enters the actions. ArrowLeft/ArrowRight move between
enabled actions (Request changes is skipped), Enter or Space activates, ArrowUp returns to
